definitions.text: To imply but stop short of explicitly stating (something).
examples: Are you suggesting that I killed my wife?

definitions.text: To cause one to suppose (something); to bring to one's mind the idea (of something).
examples: The name "hamburger" suggests that hamburgers originated from Hamburg.

definitions.text: To explicitly mention (something) as a possibility for consideration, often to recommend it.
examples: This meeting venue was suggested to us by our boss.
He suggests that we celebrate with dinner at Bellissimo. He suggests our celebrating with dinner at Bellissimo.
